input.description: Workflow arguments. `hours` is optional and defaults to 24; it controls the recent git-history window reviewed together with uncommitted changes.

hours.description: Number of hours of git history to review. Defaults to 24 when omitted.

targetPaths.description: Optional repository-relative paths to prioritize during review.

output.description: Route to Step 1 and preserve runtime inputs such as hours for both review and delegated-handoff steps.
